overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character exiting a wooden cabin at night and walking through a frontier campsite as the sky transitions from dark night to purple dawn. The character passes tents, wagons, and campfires before approaching a dog near a cooking fire.

agents.ego_description: walking from bedroom area toward the hallway exit

entered.detail: wooden frame bed with white sheets against the wall
wooden dresser with mirror and washbasin
lit oil lamp mounted on wooden wall
white curtains covering window at far end of room

segments.scene_description: The character stands in a dimly lit wooden cabin bedroom illuminated by warm oil lamps. The room contains a bed, dresser, and curtained window. The character walks forward toward a doorway leading to the hallway.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow wooden hallway with framed paintings

events.description: character opens wooden door and steps outside into night air

agents.ego_description: walking down hallway and opening door to exit the building

entered.detail: wooden panel door with metal handle
framed artwork hanging on wooden wall
lit oil lamp in wall bracket

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrow wooden hallway with wall-mounted oil lamps and framed paintings. At approximately 10.5 seconds, the character opens the wooden door at the end of the hallway, transitioning from the interior to the exterior night environment.

events.description: moving from artificial lamplight to moonlit outdoor environment

agents.ego_description: walking down wooden stairs from porch to ground level

entered.detail: wooden steps leading down from porch
warm lights from campfires visible in the distance below

segments.scene_description: The character steps onto a wooden porch overlooking a campsite below. The lighting shifts from warm artificial to cool moonlight. The character descends wooden stairs, moving from the sheltered porch down to the ground level where the camp is situated.

scene_state.functional_zone: frontier campsite with tents and wagons at night

events.description: passing first campfire with seated NPCs and canvas tents

agents.ego_description: walking through campsite passing tents, wagons, and campfires

notable_agents.action: sitting by campfire near canvas tent

entered.detail: large canvas tent with open flaps
wooden covered wagon with white canvas top

segments.scene_description: Now at ground level, the character walks through an open frontier campsite under a dark night sky. The scene includes canvas tents, covered wagons, and campfires. At 25 seconds, the character passes a seated NPC by a campfire. The ground is dirt with sparse grass.

scene_state.functional_zone: campsite at dawn with purple and pink sky

events.description: sky brightens to purple and pink dawn as sun begins to rise

agents.ego_description: continuing through camp as sky transitions from night to purple dawn

entered.detail: tall tree without leaves silhouetted against dawn sky

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking through the campsite as the environment transitions from night to dawn. At 38 seconds, the sky brightens to vibrant purple and pink hues, backlighting the scene. A large leafless tree and distant mountain range become visible against the colorful sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: campsite fire pit with cooking equipment and dog

events.description: character slows approach to campfire where dog is resting

agents.ego_description: approaching campfire where dog is lying near cooking equipment

notable_agents.action: standing by cooking fire tending to pot

entered.detail: campfire with metal cooking pot suspended over flames
wooden storage crates near fire pit

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a specific campfire with a cooking pot suspended over the flames. A dog lies near the fire, and an NPC stands nearby tending to the cooking. The ground transitions from dirt to grass as the character slows their approach at 55 seconds.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the warm, enclosed interior of a wooden cabin into an expansive frontier campsite as night transitions into a vibrant dawn. It begins in a dimly lit bedroom illuminated by oil lamps, moving through a narrow hallway lined with paintings before the character opens a door to the outside. As the camera steps onto a wooden porch, the lighting shifts from warm artificial tones to cool moonlight, descending stairs to reach the dirt ground of the camp. The scene then expands across a landscape of canvas tents, covered wagons, and flickering campfires, with the dark night sky gradually brightening into vivid purple and pink hues that reveal a distant mountain range and a large leafless tree. Finally, the character moves across the grass toward a cooking fire where a dog rests and an NPC tends to a suspended pot under the colorful morning light.
